short_blurb: Roofing for Mar Vista homes — from post-war bungalows to modern new builds.
local_note: Mar Vista's housing stock spans post-war Craftsman bungalows, mid-century ranches, and a growing inventory of modern spec homes. The neighborhood is close to the coast, so salt-air considerations apply to hardware and flashing selections. We work comfortably across all these home types and ages, from straightforward shingle replacements to complex multi-section modern flat-plus-pitched roofs.

faqs.q: My Mar Vista bungalow was built in the 1940s — are there any special considerations?
faqs.a: Older homes often have skip sheathing (boards with gaps) rather than solid plywood decking. We assess whether to add a solid plywood layer over skip sheathing during your inspection — it's often required for modern shingle installation and improves structual rigidity.
